case_title: BALLARD, THOMAS O. vs. ELLWEIN, LOLA C., A LICENSED ATTORNEY et al

PROOF OF SERVICE ON OPPOSITION, FILED
TRIAL ASSIGNED TO DEPARTMENT 01

DEPT 1/JUDGE CHOPPELAS/REPORTER:M.BRADY: DEFT LOLA ELLWEIN, ATTNY IN PRO-PER, IS PRESENT. PLTF, PLTF COUNSEL NOT PRESENT; LEGAL ASSISTANT REMA TITCOMB APPEARS WITH ORAL, UNFILED MOTION TO CONTINUE. DEFT OBJECTION- PER HER STATE- MENTS TO COURT, PLTF WAS TO FILE NOTICED MOTION PER HIS CONVERSATION WITH HER. AS IT WAS NOT FILED, DEFT ASSUMED THAT CASE WAS TO PROCEED. DEFT ALSO STATED THAT CASE CONCERNS A FEE ARBITRATION IN NAPA COUNTY, AND NAPA COUNTY SHOULD HAVE JURISDICTION. DEFT ORAL MOTION TO DISMISS ACTION IS GRANTED BY COURT.
